Error.description: Error is returned when a handler encounters an error. It contains a simple error message that the developer can customize.

message.description: Error message (e.g., 'user not found', 'database connection failed')

FieldViolation.description: FieldViolation describes a single validation error for a specific field.

description.description: Human-readable description of the validation violation (e.g., 'must be a valid email address', 'required field missing')

field.description: The field path that failed validation (e.g., 'user.email' for nested fields). For header validation, this will be the header name (e.g., 'X-API-Key')

GetItemRequest.description: GetItemRequest retrieves one OSNIT item by id.

GetItemResponse.description: GetItemResponse returns the resolved OSNIT item.

ListFeedRequest.description: ListFeedRequest retrieves normalized OSNIT items with optional filters.

from.description: Inclusive lower time boundary in epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

refresh.description: When true, forces a gather pass before querying.

items.description: Source type filters as lowercase strings: rss, x, telegram.

to.description: Inclusive upper time boundary in epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

verificationStatus.description: Verification status filter: unverified, partially_verified, verified.

nextCursor.description: Next cursor when more results exist; empty when done.

refreshedAt.description: Last gather timestamp in epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

sourceType.description: Optional source type filter: rss, x, telegram.

refreshedAt.description: Last gather timestamp in epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

OsnitItem.description: OsnitItem is a normalized intelligence item gathered from one source.

claimHash.description: Claim fingerprint for clustering and verification.

corroborationCount.description: Number of independent sources corroborating the claim.

highTrustReference.description: Whether this item came from a high-trust reference source.

id.description: Stable id assigned by the gatherer.

ingestedAt.description: Ingestion time, as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

publishedAt.description: Source publication time, as Unix epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

sourceType.description: OsnitSourceType identifies where an item was gathered from.

verificationStatus.description: OsnitVerificationStatus describes whether the claim is corroborated.

OsnitSource.description: OsnitSource describes a configured feed/query/account used for gathering.

enabled.description: Whether the source is currently enabled.

highTrust.description: Whether this source is treated as high-trust.

query.description: Optional X query syntax when source_type is X.

sourceType.description: OsnitSourceType identifies where an item was gathered from.

SearchItemsRequest.description: SearchItemsRequest searches OSNIT items with full-text and structured filters.

from.description: Inclusive lower time boundary in epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

q.description: Free-text query matched against title and full text.

refresh.description: When true, forces a gather pass before searching.

items.description: Source type filters as lowercase strings: rss, x, telegram.

to.description: Inclusive upper time boundary in epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

verificationStatus.description: Verification status filter: unverified, partially_verified, verified.

nextCursor.description: Next cursor when more results exist; empty when done.

refreshedAt.description: Last gather timestamp in epoch milliseconds.. Warning: Values > 2^53 may lose precision in JavaScript

ValidationError.description: ValidationError is returned when request validation fails. It contains a list of field violations describing what went wrong.

get.description: GetItem returns one OSNIT item by id.
ListFeed returns the latest OSNIT items with structured filters.
